name: Roasted Pepper and Avocado Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 ripe avocados, halved, pitted and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bell peppers on a baking sheet.
2. Broil 4 to 5 inches from heat for 5 minutes on each side or until the entire surface of each pepper is blistered and blackened slightly.
3. Place peppers in a paper bag; close the bag and cool the peppers for 15 - 20 minutes.
4. Cut around the cores of the peppers; twist and remove them.
5. Cut the peppers lengthwise into halves.
6. Peel off the skin with a paring knife; rinse under cold water to remove seeds.
7. Slice the peppers into 1/2-inch thick strips; place in a shallow dish.
8. Cut avocados into 1/4-inch thick slices and add them to the peppers.
9. Sprinkle shallots over the pepper mixture.
10. In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, lemon zest, and juice.
11. Pour the dressing over the pepper mixture.
12. Cover; refrigerate at least 1 hour before serving.
13. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
